metadata.description: Customer identifier code (lowercase, max 8 chars).
Azure region for all resources. Must be westeurope for naming convention compliance (weu suffix).
Monitoring tier: Essential / Managed / Advanced.
Resource ID of the customer workload resource group to monitor.
Monthly monitoring budget in EUR.
On-call email address (receives P1 alerts).
Reporting email address (receives P3 alerts).
Entra group Object ID for Monitoring Reader (Lighthouse). Leave empty to skip Lighthouse.
Entra group Object ID for Monitoring Contributor (Lighthouse). Leave empty to skip Lighthouse.
IT Synergy managing tenant ID (Lighthouse). Leave empty to skip Lighthouse.
Day of week for maintenance window alert suppression.
Maintenance window start time (HH:mm UTC).
Maintenance window end time (HH:mm UTC).
Optional: Resource ID of the VPN Gateway in the monitored RG. Required for VPN Gateway metric alerts.
Optional: Resource ID of the primary Storage Account to monitor. Required for Storage metric alerts.
Customer identifier code (lowercase, max 8 chars).
Azure region for deployment. Must be westeurope.
Interactive retention period in days.
Daily ingestion cap in GB. Set after Phase 1 calibration.
Resource tags to apply.

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] Log Analytics daily cap at 80%', parameters('klantCode'))]
properties.description: Fires when the workspace is approaching the daily ingestion cap. Investigate data sources before the cap is hit and logs stop flowing.

allOf.query: [format('Usage | where TimeGenerated > ago(1d) | summarize IngestedGB = sum(Quantity) / 1000 | where IngestedGB >= {0} * 0.8', parameters('dailyCapGb'))]

metadata.description: Full resource ID of the Log Analytics Workspace.
Log Analytics Workspace ID (customer / workspace GUID).
Log Analytics Workspace name.
Full resource ID of the Log Analytics Workspace.
Deployment tier. Determines which DCRs are deployed.
Azure region for deployment. Must be westeurope.
Resource tags to apply.

properties.description: Collect VM performance counters and Windows Event Logs.
Collect Storage account capacity and transaction metrics.
Collect Recovery Services Vault backup diagnostic data (AzureBackupReport).
Collect VPN Gateway diagnostic logs (Gateway + Tunnel).
Collect AVD host pool diagnostic data (connections, errors, registrations).

metadata.description: Resource ID of the VM DCR.
Resource ID of the Storage DCR.
Resource ID of the RSV DCR.
Resource ID of the VPN Gateway DCR.
Resource ID of the AVD DCR.
Azure region for deployment. Must be westeurope.
Full resource ID of the Log Analytics Workspace (reserved for Phase 2 direct query).
Workspace Customer ID (GUID) for Data Collector API.
Resource tags to apply.
Customer identifier code.
HTTPS trigger URL for the Logic App. Pass this to action-groups.bicep.
Resource ID of the Logic App.
HTTPS webhook URI of the Autotask Logic App.
Email address of the on-call engineer (receives P1 alerts).
Email address for reporting (receives P3 alerts).
Resource tags to apply.
Resource ID of the P1 Action Group.
Resource ID of the P2 Action Group.
Resource ID of the P3 Action Group.
Full resource ID of the Log Analytics Workspace.
Deployment tier.
Azure region for deployment. Must be westeurope.
Resource ID of the P1 Action Group.
Resource ID of the P2 Action Group.
Resource ID of the P3 Action Group.
Customer identifier code.
Optional: Resource ID of the VPN Gateway to monitor. Leave empty to skip VPN GW metric alerts.
Optional: Resource ID of the primary Storage Account to monitor. Leave empty to skip Storage metric alerts.
Resource tags to apply.

properties.description: Fires on any Azure Service Health incident affecting the customer region or services.
Fires when any resource transitions to Unavailable state (sustained > 5 min enforced by APR).
Fires when any resource transitions to Degraded state (sustained > 15 min).
Fires on first backup job failure for any protected item.

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] RSV backup job failed 2x consecutive (P1)', parameters('klantCode'))]
properties.description: Fires when the same protected item fails backup twice in a row.

allOf.query:
AddonAzureBackupJobs
            | where JobOperation == "Backup"
            | where JobStatus == "Failed"
            | summarize Failures = count() by BackupItemUniqueId
            | where Failures >= 2

properties.description: Fires when RSV soft delete or immutability settings are changed.
VPN tunnel offline no redundant tunnel P1
VPN tunnel offline redundant tunnel active P2
VPN Gateway bandwidth high P3 dynamic threshold
Fires when more than 2 session hosts or > 25% of pool are unavailable.

allOf.query:
WVDErrors
            | where TimeGenerated > ago(5m)
            | where ServiceError == "true"
            | summarize HostErrors = dcount(SessionHostName)
            | where HostErrors > 2

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] AVD connection errors elevated (P2, dynamic)', parameters('klantCode'))]
properties.description: Fires when AVD connection errors exceed the dynamically learned baseline.

allOf.query:
WVDConnections
            | where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
            | where State == "Connected"
            | summarize Errors = countif(isnotempty(ClientSideIPAddress) == false)

properties.description: Fires when the AVD scaling plan fails to execute an autoscale action.
Storage account availability below 99.9 percent over 5 minutes P1
Storage used capacity exceeds 80 percent of provisioned limit P3
Storage used capacity exceeds 95 percent of provisioned limit P2
Azure Files SuccessWithThrottling sustained more than 10 minutes P2
Fires when a VM stops sending heartbeat signals for more than 5 minutes.

allOf.query:
Heartbeat
            | summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
            | where LastHeartbeat < ago(5m)

properties.description: Fires when a critical resource (NSG, VNet, Vault, VM, VPN GW) is deleted.
Fires when any RBAC role assignment or definition is created or deleted at subscription level.
Fires when Azure Policy detects a new non-compliant resource in the baseline policy set. Escalate to P2 for security category policies.

allOf.query:
AzureActivity
            | where CategoryValue == "Policy"
            | where ActivityStatusValue == "Start"
            | where Properties has "NonCompliant"

metadata.description: Resource ID of the resource group to scope the suppression to.
Customer identifier code.
Maintenance window start time (HH:mm, UTC).
Maintenance window end time (HH:mm, UTC).
Day of week for the weekly maintenance window.
Resource tags to apply.

properties.description: [format('Suppresses all alerts during the weekly maintenance window ({0} {1}‚{2} UTC).', parameters('maintenanceWindowDayOfWeek'), parameters('maintenanceWindowStart'), parameters('maintenanceWindowEnd'))]

metadata.description: Resource ID of the Alert Processing Rule.
Customer identifier code.
Monthly budget amount in EUR.
Resource ID of the P2 Action Group (100% alert + anomaly).
Resource ID of the P3 Action Group (80% and 90% alerts).
Start date for the budget period in format YYYY-MM-DD.
Resource ID of the budget.
Budget name for reference in Chore 11 calibration.
Customer identifier code.
Full resource ID of the Log Analytics Workspace.
Azure region for the policy assignment managed identity. Must be westeurope.

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] Diag settings – VMs to LAW', parameters('klantCode'))]

nonComplianceMessages.message: VM diagnostic settings must route to the monitoring Log Analytics Workspace.

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] Diag settings – Storage to LAW', parameters('klantCode'))]

nonComplianceMessages.message: Storage account diagnostic settings must route to the monitoring Log Analytics Workspace.

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] Diag settings – RSV to LAW', parameters('klantCode'))]

nonComplianceMessages.message: Recovery Services Vault diagnostic settings must route to the monitoring Log Analytics Workspace.

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] Diag settings – VPN GW to LAW', parameters('klantCode'))]

nonComplianceMessages.message: VPN Gateway diagnostic settings must route to the monitoring Log Analytics Workspace.

metadata.description: Resource ID of the VM policy assignment.
Resource ID of the Storage policy assignment.
Managing tenant ID (IT Synergy Azure AD tenant).
Object ID of the Entra security group for Monitoring Reader access.
Object ID of the Entra security group for Monitoring Contributor access.
Customer identifier code.

properties.description: Delegates monitoring read and contribute access for the IT Synergy monitoring baseline.

metadata.description: Resource ID of the Lighthouse registration definition.
Resource ID of the Lighthouse registration assignment.
Log Analytics Workspace resource ID.
P1 Action Group resource ID.
P2 Action Group resource ID.
P3 Action Group resource ID.
